query:
SELECT 1 as has_permission
        FROM community_members cm
        JOIN roles r ON cm.role_id = r.id
        WHERE cm.user_id = $1
          AND cm.community_id = $2
          AND cm.status = 'active'
          AND (
            r.permissions @> $3::jsonb
            OR r.permissions @> '["all"]'::jsonb
          )
